summary: Small CI/package-publishing fix touching GitHub package build scripts: pinned the Linux package Dockerfile to a specific wibo image version, `ghcr.io/decompals/wibo:0.6.11`, instead of `latest`, and removed a font download/extraction step from the generated pages setup script. No PR body or review discussion was present, so the exact CI failure mode is not documented in the slice.

what_changed.change: Changed the multi-stage COPY source for wibo from `ghcr.io/decompals/wibo:latest` to the fixed tag `ghcr.io/decompals/wibo:0.6.11`.
Deleted the `Acquire fonts` block that downloaded `a-otf-folk-pro_WeXVg.zip` from fontsgeek, extracted it with `bsdtar`, and moved `A-OTF Folk Pro H.otf` into `/opt/assets/progress`.

smart_moves: Pinned a CI Docker dependency instead of relying on `latest`, improving reproducibility for package publishing builds.
Removed an external font download from CI setup, reducing reliance on a third-party URL whose availability, archive layout, or licensing/access behavior could break unattended package publishing.
Kept the fix narrowly scoped to package CI scripts, with only one Dockerfile line changed and one obsolete setup block removed.
decomp_lessons: For decompilation infrastructure, avoid floating container tags in release or publishing workflows; pin tools like wibo to known-good versions so build behavior stays stable over time.
CI scripts should minimize network dependencies outside controlled package registries or project-owned assets, especially for generated pages or publish jobs.
When progress/reporting assets need fonts or other binary resources, prefer checked-in assets, controlled artifacts, or documented package dependencies over ad hoc curl downloads.
naming_conventions: The Dockerfile uses uppercase build args such as `WIBO_PATH` and `DEVKITPRO` for configurable tool/install paths.
The setup script used lowercase shell variables such as `fonts_url` for transient script-local values.
Package CI paths are organized under `.github/packages/`, with separate subdirectories for `build-linux` and `gen-pages`.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that update `ghcr.io/decompals/wibo` tags or discuss wibo version pinning.
Search for package publishing failures related to `.github/packages/gen-pages/setup.sh` or missing progress fonts.
Audit CI Dockerfiles for remaining `:latest` image references that could make builds non-reproducible.
Check whether progress page font assets are now provided elsewhere after removal of the fontsgeek download.
